guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 24. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_s: Point to the big S and say: ssssss. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_e: Now point to the big E and say: eeeeee.

parent_story: Sally the snake saw a fresh egg. Sally slid past the egg in the grass.
